content_blocks.text:
भानुः श्यामललोहितद्युतितनुश्वन्द्रः सितांगो युवा
दुर्वाश्यामलकान्तिरिन्दुतनयः संरक्तगौरः कुजः ।
मन्त्री गौरकलेवरः सिततनुः शुक्रोसितांगः शनिः
चानलिाकृतिदेहवानाहपतिः केतुर्विचित्रद्युतिः ॥ ७॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
भानुः श्यामललोहितद्युतितनुश्वन्द्रः सितांगो युवा
दुर्वाश्यामलकान्तिरिन्दुतनयः संरक्तगौरः कुजः ।
मन्त्री गौरकलेवरः सिततनुः शुक्रोसितांगः शनिः
चानलिाकृतिदेहवानाहपतिः केतुर्विचित्रद्युतिः ॥ ७॥

content_blocks.text: The Sun possesses a form with dark-red rays. The Moon is a youth with a white body. Budha (the Moon's son) has the lovely dark-green hue of Durva or bent grass. Kuja is of a pale red colour. Jupiter has a body of yellowish hue. Sukra has a white person. Sani is dark in form. Rahu has a body black in appearance. Ketu has a variegated aspect.

verse_data.translation: The Sun possesses a form with dark-red rays. The Moon is a youth with a white body. Budha (the Moon's son) has the lovely dark-green hue of Durva or bent grass. Kuja is of a pale red colour. Jupiter has a body of yellowish hue. Sukra has a white person. Sani is dark in form. Rahu has a body black in appearance. Ketu has a variegated aspect.

content_blocks.text:
प्रकाशकौ शीतकरप्रभाकरौ ताराग्रहाः पञ्च धरासुतादयः ।
तमः स्वरूपौ शिस्विसिहिकासुतौ शुभाः शशिज्ञामरवन्धभार्गवाः ।।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
प्रकाशकौ शीतकरप्रभाकरौ ताराग्रहाः पञ्च धरासुतादयः ।
तमः स्वरूपौ शिस्विसिहिकासुतौ शुभाः शशिज्ञामरवन्धभार्गवाः ।।
verse_data.topic: Classification of planets as luminous/dark and auspicious/inauspicious

content_blocks.text: The Moon and the Sun are luminous. The five planets beginning with Kuja are star planets. Ketu and Rahu are of the nature of darkness. The Moon, Mercury, Jupiter and Venus are auspicious.

verse_data.translation: The Moon and the Sun are luminous. The five planets beginning with Kuja are star planets. Ketu and Rahu are of the nature of darkness. The Moon, Mercury, Jupiter and Venus are auspicious.
verse_data.topic: Classification of planets as luminous/dark and auspicious/inauspicious

content_blocks.text:
क्षीर्णेदुमन्दरविराडुशिखिक्षमाजाः
पापास्तु पापयुतचन्द्रसुतश्च पापः ।
नेषामतीव शुभदौ गुरुदानवेज्यौ
कुरी दिवाकरसुतक्षितिजौ भवेताम् ॥ ९ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
क्षीर्णेदुमन्दरविराडुशिखिक्षमाजाः
पापास्तु पापयुतचन्द्रसुतश्च पापः ।
नेषामतीव शुभदौ गुरुदानवेज्यौ
कुरी दिवाकरसुतक्षितिजौ भवेताम् ॥ ९ ॥

content_blocks.text: But the waning Moon, Saturn, the Sun, Rahu, Ketu and Mars are malign. Budha in conjunction with a malign planet is malignant also. Of those (styled benign planets), Jupiter and Venus are exceedingly auspicious (benefic). Saturn and Mars are exceedingly malefie (among the malignant planets),

verse_data.translation: But the waning Moon, Saturn, the Sun, Rahu, Ketu and Mars are malign. Budha in conjunction with a malign planet is malignant also. Of those (styled benign planets), Jupiter and Venus are exceedingly auspicious (benefic). Saturn and Mars are exceedingly malefie (among the malignant planets),

भानुः श्यामललोहितद्युतितनुश्वन्द्रः सितांगो युवा
दुर्वाश्यामलकान्तिरिन्दुतनयः संरक्तगौरः कुजः ।

चानलिाकृतिदेहवानाहपतिः केतुर्विचित्रद्युतिः ॥ ७॥

तमः स्वरूपौ शिस्विसिहिकासुतौ शुभाः शशिज्ञामरवन्धभार्गवाः ।।
Sloku. 8. The Moon and the Sun are luminous.
The five planets beginning with Kuja are star planets.
Ketu and Rahu are of the nature of darkness. The
Moon, Mercury, Jupiter and Venus are auspicious..
